arts.ttl: Newcastle star Bruno Guimaraes transfer 'agreement' as £60m Arsenal stance emerges
arts.sum: The Brazilian international has been a staple of Eddie Howe's midfield since joining from Lyon for £40 million in 2022, but now Arsenal's new sporting director Andre Berta is looking to steady his by bringing Guimaraes to The Emirates . As Berta attempts to gut the Newcastle side, reports have come in from Spanish outlet AS that the Magpies have agreed a deal that could see the Brazilian leave St James' for £60 million if they fail to qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as four miss Chelsea with perfect Bukayo Saka return scenario clear
arts.sum: The Gunners sealed their place in the Champions League quarter-finals earlier this week having beaten PSV 9-3 on aggregate. Some involvement in those fixtures could see Saka back in the starting XI for the first leg at Emirates Stadium or potentially the following week in Madrid.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has already highlighted what Arsenal must not do against Chelsea
arts.sum: Arsenal appeared to be in control at Stamford Bridge when Gabriel Martinelli netted the opener against Chelsea the last time these two sides met in November. While Chelsea's form is not what it was at the start of the season, the Blues do have tonnes of quality throughout the squad and Arteta will be keen to not give the west Londoners space and time.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea make final decision over Sancho returning to Man United
arts.sum: Chelsea have no plans to send Jadon Sancho back to Manchester United this summer, despite having a clause that could technically allow them to do so. The 24-year-old winger has shown glimpses of his talent since joining Chelsea on loan, but his performances have been far from spectacular. arts.ttl: William Gallas slams 'unacceptable' Arsenal problem that's been 'going on for years'
arts.sum: William Gallas has had some strong words for his former club Arsenal this week following last weekend's draw at Manchester United which saw them lose further ground on Liverpool in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal join race for Georgian wonderkid Saba Kharebashvili
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Arsenal are keen to secure the signing of Georgian talent Saba Kharebashvili . EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal join race for Georgian wonderkid Saba Kharebashvili

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer plan after Geovany Quenda deal revealed
arts.sum: The widely rumoured transfer of Geovany Quenda is expected to be the first of multiple attacking additions for Chelsea this summer.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ‘will make a concrete attempt’ to sign Arsenal star
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid are ready to launch an all-out assault on the signature of a member of the defensive ranks at Arsenal. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'open talks with Nico Williams' camp' over summer transfer - but face strong competition from European heavyweights
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly made contact with Athletic Bilbao star Nico Williams' representatives over a potential transfer in what could be one of the coups of the summer.

arts.ttl: Forest fire THREE in SEVEN minutes in huge win to close gap on Arsenal
